SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.synthesis

Class FlowsheetProposal

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.synthesis.FlowsheetProposal
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class FlowsheetProposal extends Object implements Serializable
Result of FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuild(SeparationDuty).

A proposal carries:

  • the recommended ProcessSystem (already built and ready to run),
  • a human-readable rationale string explaining why this structure was chosen,
  • a discrete FlowsheetProposal.Strategy tag (single flash, two-stage flash, distillation, …),
  • per-product purity predictions keyed by component name,
  • an ordered list of alternatives that were considered but not selected, with the reason for rejection.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Constructor Details

    • FlowsheetProposal

      public FlowsheetProposal(FlowsheetProposal.Strategy strategy, String rationale, ProcessSystem processSystem, Map<String,Double> topProductPredicted, Map<String,Double> bottomProductPredicted, List<String> alternatives, boolean specsMet)
      Creates a proposal.
      Parameters:
      strategy - the structural choice
      rationale - human-readable explanation
      processSystem - the assembled flowsheet
      topProductPredicted - predicted top-product mole fractions keyed by component
      bottomProductPredicted - predicted bottom-product mole fractions keyed by component
      alternatives - alternative proposals considered, with their rejection reason
      specsMet - true when all duty specs are predicted to be satisfied

  • Method Details

    • getStrategy

      public FlowsheetProposal.Strategy getStrategy()
      Returns the strategy tag.
      Returns:
      non-null Strategy

    • getRationale

      public String getRationale()
      Returns the rationale.
      Returns:
      non-null human-readable string

    • getProcessSystem

      public ProcessSystem getProcessSystem()
      Returns the built flowsheet.
      Returns:
      the ProcessSystem (already populated; not yet run)

    • getTopProductPredicted

      public Map<String,Double> getTopProductPredicted()
      Returns the predicted top-product mole fractions.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable map; never null

    • getBottomProductPredicted

      public Map<String,Double> getBottomProductPredicted()
      Returns the predicted bottom-product mole fractions.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable map; never null

    • getAlternatives

      public List<String> getAlternatives()
      Returns the alternatives considered but rejected.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list; never null

    • isSpecsMet

      public boolean isSpecsMet()
      Returns whether the predicted compositions satisfy every duty spec.
      Returns:
      true when all specs are met

    • toJson

      public com.google.gson.JsonObject toJson()
      Returns a JSON description of this proposal — useful for agent handoff.
      Returns:
      a JsonObject with the proposal fields (no nested ProcessSystem)
